definition:
A man living at the time of the Patriarchs, first mentioned at Gen.36.20; 
 father of: Lotan (H3877), Shobal (H7732), Zibeon (H6649H), Anah (H6034H), Dishon (H1787), Ezer (H0687), Dishan (H1789), Timna (H8555H)
 § Seir = "hairy" or "shaggy"
 patriarch of the Horites, the inhabitants of Edom before the descendants of Esau, the Edomites
